fields.success_measures: Ensure fast, reliable access to applications and networks.
Reduce vulnerability and protect data from breaches.
Make technology easier and faster for employees/students/customers.
Faster support, fewer disruptions, better customer satisfaction.
Optimize hardware, software, cloud resources, and licensing.
Backup success rate (100%)
Average response time to support tickets
ICT budget variance (%)
Number of security incidents per quarter
Server downtime incidents: 0–2 per month

fields.description:
1. Improve System Uptime and Reliability

Target: Maintain at least 99% uptime for all critical university/organization systems (ERP, emails, network infrastructure).
fields.success_measures: Measure: Monthly uptime reports and incident logs.

fields.description:
2. Enhance Cybersecurity and Data Protection

Target: Implement at least three new security measures (e.g., MFA, firewall updates, endpoint protection) and conduct one cybersecurity awareness training per quarter.
fields.success_measures: Measure: Security audit reports and training attendance records.

fields.description:
3. Support ICT Service Delivery and User Satisfaction

Target: Resolve 90% of ICT support tickets within the agreed SLA timelines and reduce recurring issues through preventive action.
fields.success_measures: Measure: Ticketing system reports and user feedback surveys.

fields.description:
4. Drive Digitalization and Automation Projects

Target: Successfully automate or digitalize at least two manual processes within the financial year to improve service delivery and efficiency.
fields.success_measures: Measure: Project reports and adoption levels of new digital tools.

fields.description:
5. Strengthen ICT Infrastructure

Target: Upgrade or maintain key network components (servers, switches, routers, and backup systems) and ensure 100% compliance with scheduled maintenance cycles.
fields.success_measures: Measure: Infrastructure maintenance logs and upgrade completion reports.
100% of scheduled classes taught
Upload lesson plans before start of semester
≥ 4.0/5 average teaching evaluation
Mark and release results within 14 days of exam
100% adherence to approved curriculum

fields.description: Maintain accurate and timely financial reporting
fields.success_measures: Reports submitted on schedule with 100% compliance and minimal corrections
Variance between budget and actual spending maintained within ±5%
Monthly cash flow statements prepared and reviewed; positive cash position maintained
Reduction in errors in financial transactions and reconciliations

fields.description: Ensure compliance with financial regulations and policies
fields.success_measures: Zero audit flags or compliance findings

fields.description: Demonstrates proficiency in required technical skills
Applies technical knowledge to solve problems
Shares technical knowledge with team members
Provides constructive feedback to team members
Considers multiple perspectives in decision process
99%–99.9% uptime for all critical systems (network, servers, ERP, LMS, emails).
Maintain network latency and bandwidth at optimal levels.
Respond to all user tickets within 30 minutes – 2 hours depending on priority.
100% inventory accuracy for computers, routers, printers, etc.
